issues.title: App crashes when clicking login button
issues.solution_summary: The when issue is caused by improper state handling in tests/test_webhook.py. Race condition or missing validation triggers this error.

issues.title: Add dark mode support
issues.solution_summary: Implementing 'Add dark mode support' requires adding new module with state management and UI components.

issues.title: SQL Injection vulnerability in login endpoint
issues.solution_summary: CRITICAL: SQL Injection vulnerability in login endpoint exposes the application to attacks. Input sanitization and access controls are missing.

issues.title: CRITICAL: Memory leak in worker orchestration loop
issues.solution_summary: The null issue is caused by improper state handling in src\agents\async_orchestrator.py. Race condition or missing validation triggers this error.
